edge_hypothesis: MACD histogram zero-line cross is a proven signal (9 ACCEPTs, best PF=1.712 at 7:1 R:R). The Supertrend family showed that pushing R:R from 5:1 to 8:1 improved PF from 1.395 to 1.921. Hypothesis: MACD follows the same pattern — wider TP captures rare tail events that dominate returns. Testing 10:1 and 12:1 R:R to find the MACD optimal R:R frontier.

variants.name: macd_tail_10to1
variants.description: MACD histogram zero-line cross at 10:1 R:R. Tests if wider TP than current best (7:1) captures larger tail moves on ETH 4h.

components.notes: EMA_50 as trend direction baseline for MACD confirmation
MACDh_12_26_9 zero-line cross as entry signal

variants.name: macd_tail_12to1
variants.description: MACD histogram zero-line cross at 12:1 R:R. Ultra-wide TP to capture maximum tail events. RSI slingshot proved 12:1 works (PF=1.270); does MACD perform better at this ratio?

components.notes: EMA_50 as trend direction baseline for MACD confirmation
MACDh_12_26_9 zero-line cross as entry signal

variants.name: macd_wide_stop_8to1
variants.description: MACD histogram zero-line cross at 8:1 R:R with wider 2.0 ATR stop. Tests whether extra breathing room reduces premature stop-outs while maintaining high R:R. Vortex v2b showed wider stops can hurt — does MACD behave differently?

components.notes: EMA_50 as trend direction baseline for MACD confirmation
MACDh_12_26_9 zero-line cross as entry signal
